pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-006 (Risk and Compliance/Task) scores 0.421 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.421) and is edge_case for the ISO 8000 Data Technician role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for technician-level ISO 8000 Data Technician.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, DDaT signal (0.421), and Risk and Compliance handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis confirms Risk and Compliance competencies at composite 0.421 are consistent with ISO 8000 Data Technician hiring criteria.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Market evidence supports this competency for ISO 8000 Data Technician. Final decision: include.
